articles.title: Inside WGA Deal: How The Writers Made Nice With The AMPTP - Deadline
articles.description: The Writers Guild of America became the first of the three above-the-line unions make a deal with the studios.
articles.content: EXCLUSIVE: In a major bargaining plot twist, the Writers Guild of America became the first of the three above-the-line entertainment unions to finalize a tentative deal with the major studios and str… [+5787 chars]
